name: IIFCL – Assistant General Manager & Deputy General Manager – 15 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIFCL AGM & DGM Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 15 Assistant General Manager, Deputy General Manager Posts
basic_details.short_information: The India Infrastructure Finance Company Limited (IIFCL) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 15 Assistant General Manager & Deputy General Manager. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, CA, M.E/M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 08-05-2026, and closes on 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through IIFCL website, https://www.iifcl.in.
basic_details.organization_name: India Infrastructure Finance Company Limited (IIFCL), Govt. of India Undertaking
basic_details.post_name: Assistant General Manager (Grade C) & Deputy General Manager (Grade D)

how_to_apply: Candidates must fill the application form, sign it, and send it along with self-attested copies of all relevant documents by ordinary post / speed post only to the registered address of IIFCL. No other mode of application will be accepted.
